textByHash.0356e594bda4fdf4d3d4a9d2e5ca16c46c09e3a6: Feel the full strength of my wrath now!
textByHash.4e3644dedb69470b93004a69a9390a5be8ccfb39: Time to see the power of ice!
textByHash.64522cf5ac6a82d6a40638e10467358efc06a70a: Face the force of my fury!
textByHash.69ef8d19c29b2ddbf2c4622bcac5f64b51eae83a: Let's see how you handle this!
textByHash.6f9e22bdca1e0cc392ee0f575a41526ce032494c: Be prepare for the true power of ice!
textByHash.a123d25ad529c59268a29f9ba12dcf7a7e0c7553: Feel the wrath of the ice!
textByHash.a8d4b6ef34cd37492ce3a0f1da19ba6339d9686f: The time has come to show you my true power!
textByHash.aa75404a75eebd411c8921f1992b6bc3150ac08f: Tremble before the strength of ice!
textByHash.d1c9dc99a86fe5ee784af5c7e7b250e62934f16c: Time to show you my full strength!
textByHash.d6c6068e945ee5ece85659543d1cf65ae3b5aaef: Now, there's nothing holding me back!
textByHash.efc4178599a51a2e791d3fc8951bcc65f72eaab2: No more running, face me now!
textByHash.fd28621ab18cf588be76844c13d9d1a6da31c0ad: Time to feel the strength of ice!
